tasks.label: free-port-3001
args: $ports = 3001,4001; foreach ($port in $ports) { $conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $port -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; foreach ($c in $conns) { try { Stop-Process -Id $c.OwningProcess -ErrorAction Stop } catch {} } }

tasks.label: run-site-clean-3002
args: $ports = 3002,4002; foreach ($port in $ports) { $conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $port -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; foreach ($c in $conns) { try { Stop-Process -Id $c.OwningProcess -ErrorAction Stop } catch {} } }; if (Test-Path .next) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force .next }; pnpm dev -- --port 3002 --socket-port 4002

tasks.label: check-port-3002
args: $c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3002 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($c) { Write-Output "LISTENING" } else { Write-Output "NOT_LISTENING" }

tasks.label: check-http-3002
args: try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:3002 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "STATUS:$($r.StatusCode)" } catch { if ($_.Exception.Response) { Write-Output "STATUS:$([int]$_.Exception.Response.StatusCode)" } else { Write-Output "REQUEST_FAILED" } }

tasks.label: check-tcp-3002
args: $ok = Test-NetConnection -ComputerName localhost -Port 3002 -InformationLevel Quiet; if ($ok) { Write-Output "TCP_OK" } else { Write-Output "TCP_FAIL" }

tasks.label: restart-site-clean-3001
args: $ports = 3001,4001; foreach ($port in $ports) { $conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $port -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; foreach ($c in $conns) { try { Stop-Process -Id $c.OwningProcess -ErrorAction Stop } catch {} } }; if (Test-Path .next) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force .next }; pnpm dev -- --port 3001 --socket-port 4001
